name: construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Reconciling subcontractor invoices and payments efficiently.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Reconciling subcontractor invoices and payments efficiently.
